creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
Do you recognise this cathedral? 👀

📍Durham Cathedral in the North West of England isn’t just absolutely gorgeous (seriously, this is one of the most majestic cathedrals I’ve ever seen), it’s also a must visit spot if you’re a film nerd 🎬

There are multiples scenes shot in Durham Cathedral in a few different Harry Potter movies ⚡️

If you’re a fan of Avengers, and mainly Avengers Endgame from 2019, you should also recognise the cathedral 😎

Be honest… did you recognise the cathedral from these movies? 😀

#durham #durhamcathedral #harrypotterworld #avengersendgame #traveltips
